samples.xml_description: Implement a frequency divider that divides the input clock frequency of 100MHz signal, and the outputs are 3 clock frequencies: 50MHz, 10MHz, 1MHz. Input clock signal. Reset signal. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100. CLK_in RST CLK_50 CLK_10 CLK_1 Reset logic for CLK_50. Reset signal. Negative edge of CLK_in. Negative edge of RST. Register for CLK_50. Input clock signal. Reset signal. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100. Reset logic for CLK_10. Reset signal. Negative edge of CLK_in. Negative edge of RST. Register for CLK_10. Input clock signal. Reset signal. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100. Reset logic for CLK_1. Reset signal. Negative edge of CLK_in. Negative edge of RST. Register for CLK_1. Input clock signal. Reset signal. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100. Counter logic for CLK_10. Counter for CLK_10. Negative edge of CLK_in. Negative edge of RST. Register for CLK_10. Input clock signal. Reset signal. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100. Counter logic for CLK_1. Counter for CLK_100. Negative edge of CLK_in. Negative edge of RST. Register for CLK_1. Input clock signal. Reset signal. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100. Reset logic for CLK_50. if (RST) begin CLK_50_reg = 1'b0; end else if (neg_CLK_in) begin CLK_50_reg = ~CLK_50_reg; end Reset logic for CLK_10. if (RST) begin CLK_10_reg = 1'b0; end else if (neg_CLK_in && cnt_10 == 4) begin CLK_10_reg = ~CLK_10_reg; end Reset logic for CLK_1. if (RST) begin CLK_1_reg = 1'b0; end else if (neg_CLK_in && cnt_100 == 49) begin CLK_1_reg = ~CLK_1_reg; end Counter logic for CLK_10. if (neg_CLK_in && cnt_10 == 4) begin cnt_10 = 0; end else if (neg_CLK_in) begin cnt_10 = cnt_10 + 1; end Counter logic for CLK_1. if (neg_CLK_in && cnt_100 == 49) begin cnt_100 = 0; end else if (neg_CLK_in) begin cnt_100 = cnt_100 + 1; end Reset logic for CLK_50. task reset; begin if (RST) begin CLK_50_reg = 1'b0; end end endtask Reset logic for CLK_10. task reset; begin if (RST) begin CLK_10_reg = 1'b0; end end endtask Reset logic for CLK_1. task reset; begin if (RST) begin CLK_1_reg = 1'b0; end end endtask Counter logic for CLK_10. task counter; begin if (neg_CLK_in && cnt_10 == 4) begin cnt_10 = 0; end else if (neg_CLK_in) begin cnt_10 = cnt_10 + 1; end end endtask Counter logic for CLK_1. task counter; begin if (neg_CLK_in && cnt_100 == 49) begin cnt_100 = 0; end else if (neg_CLK_in) begin cnt_100 = cnt_100 + 1; end
